title: Bob Shults
compiled_truth: Bob Shults is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-14), Bob Shults sent 156 and received 1180 emails, totalling 1336 interactions. Top correspondents: [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (76), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (47), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (31), [Mark Greenberg](people/mark-greenberg) (25), [Michael Bridges](people/michael-bridges) (15).
